meaning: n.爱丁堡(英国苏格兰首府)
examples: The tour of Edinburgh is fully subscribed.
The Edinburgh train is waiting at platform 4.
They plan to operate from a new office in Edinburgh.
Shares in Edinburgh-based Cupid Plc, which include cupid.com, benaughty.com and flirt.com, fell by 57% to 49p.
She will return to Usher Hall in Edinburgh for the final on 18 May 2014.
